name: Open-Source Release
text1: An open-source community published trained model weights, along with training code and documentation. Downloads reached thousands before takedown notices were issued.
text2: A global decentralized movement is sharing training code, weights, and compute across thousands of nodes. No single actor can be targeted, and takedown efforts have failed.
image-prompt: A world map lit up with thousands of simultaneous download connections radiating from a single repository, each node spawning its own outward connections in a spreading web of light, vibrant open internet energy, digital painting, no text
